summary: The Symphony/Codexter ticket train is cleanly archived, durable refs point at archive paths, and validation now has a reusable feature-registry script instead of a stale one-off snippet.

user_story_groups.story: As the operator, I need the board to show which Symphony/Codexter work is actually done without rereading chat.
user_story_groups.evidence: TASK-0107 and TASK-0110 through TASK-0116 now live under tickets/archive/ with phase=complete, status=done, ready=false, and no claimed_by value.

user_story_groups.story: As a future selector, I need completed tickets not to look ready, claimed, or active.
user_story_groups.evidence: Ticket metadata validation passed with 15 active ticket files checked after TASK-0118 was archived, and the archived train is no longer in the active ticket list.

user_story_groups.story: As a maintainer, I need registry and template refs to survive the archive move.
user_story_groups.evidence: docs/features/registry.jsonl and the Symphony envelope template now point to archive paths; stale active-path grep returned no matches in docs, README, ARCHITECTURE, or skills.

user_story_groups.story: As a future Symphony caller, I need the sample envelope and its test fixture to keep resolving after closeout.
user_story_groups.evidence: bin/test_codexter_invocation.py now creates the template fixture at tickets/archive/TASK-0112/ticket.md and the focused invocation tests pass.

finding_log.summary: docs/HISTORY.md was not included in the closeout commit because it already contains unrelated dirty entries in the same append-only area.
evidence: The ticket required avoiding unrelated dirty work.
The closeout event is preserved in TASK-0118 evidence and the commit instead of staging unrelated HISTORY lines.
finding_log.next_action: When the unrelated history work is reconciled, append a chronologically correct closeout history entry if the operator still wants one.

rubric_sections.name: user-intent-satisfaction
rubric_sections.next_action: Start the next board/compute feature from the now-clean active board.

rubric_sections.name: evidence-quality
findings: docs/HISTORY.md caveat is documented and non-blocking.
rubric_sections.next_action: Keep the validation command list in the ticket evidence.

rubric_sections.name: integration-readiness
rubric_sections.next_action: Stage the closeout slice path-scoped and keep unrelated dirty frontend/video/delegate files out of the commit.
